name: Polynesian Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the pork chops in a single layer in a baking dish.
2. Sprinkle each chop with salt, pepper and rosemary.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the soy sauce, ketchup and honey until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture evenly over the pork chops.
5. Roast at 300°F for 2-1/2 hours, basting frequently.
6. The pork should be very dark and juicy when finished cooking.
NOTE: These can also be prepared in a crockpot for 6 hours on high heat.
